title: Iron Ladders
description: Adds new ladders that have a higher climbing speed
body:
## **About:** The mod adds new ladder variants made from different materials. More expensive materials provide faster climbing speed ## **Features:** - **Morph** ladders: change appearance without changing stats - **Styler Tool**: change a ladder’s look by cycling model variants - Use the **Sensor Tool** to add an entity detector that outputs redstone, or the **Light Tool** to light up ladders ## **Configuration:** - Adjust ladder **speed** bonuses (global + per ladder) - Set the default ladder model (e.g., use the **vanilla model**) - **Hide uncraftable ladders** when required non-vanilla materials are missing - Toggle **multi-variant** ladder visuals (subtle random texture variations) ## **Recipes:**

## **Ladder models:** _Set a default in the config, or switch models in-game with the Styler Tool_

## **Compatibility with other mods:** ### JEI/REI/EMI: - Read Item descriptions - Hide unavailable ladders from their panels when required materials are missing (configurable) ### Jade / The One Probe / WTHIT: - See the current ladder morph/model state - See whether attachments are hidden by the Casing Tool - Get contextual hints while using ladder tools
